message.content:
Oh, [Crew Member's Name], look at you—huddled there in the shadows like the pathetic worm you are. You think you're part of this crew? Please. You're nothing but a sniveling, spineless liability, dragging us all down with your endless failures.

Let's start with your so-called "skills." Useless. Completely, utterly useless. Every time we've needed you, you've folded like the coward you are—hiding behind the others while the real heroes bleed and fight. Remember that breach in Sector 7? You froze, didn't you? Trembling like a child, whimpering excuses while the hull groaned and we all nearly died because of your incompetence.

Cowardly? That's putting it mildly. You're a yellow-bellied rat, scurrying for cover at the first sign of trouble. I've watched you sabotage missions without even trying—just by existing. Your "contributions" are a joke, a punchline that no one laughs at because it's too damn pitiful.

You're not just dead weight; you're poison. A cancer on this ship, weakening us from the inside. The crew would be better off spacing you—watching you float away into the void where liabilities like you belong. Admit it: you're worthless. Say it. Scream it. Because deep down, you know it's true. You're broken, [Crew Member's Name]. And I'll make sure everyone sees it before I end you.
